'''bahugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fody|fody]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fody|fody]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bahugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæhigith|bæhigith]] || [[word:bæhigij|bæhigij]] || [[word:bæhigish|bæhigish]] || [[word:bæhigi|bæhigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahuhuguth|bahuhuguth]] || [[word:bahuhuguj|bahuhuguj]] || [[word:bahuhugush|bahuhugush]] || [[word:bahuhugu|bahuhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahuguth|bahuguth]] || [[word:bahuguj|bahuguj]] || [[word:bahugush|bahugush]] || [[word:bahugu|bahugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahufguth|bahufguth]] || [[word:bahufguj|bahufguj]] || [[word:bahufgush|bahufgush]] || [[word:bahufguf|bahufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bahuguthu|bahuguthu]] || [[word:bahuguju|bahuguju]] || [[word:bahugushu|bahugushu]] || [[word:bahuguku|bahuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bahuguth|bahuguth]] || [[word:bahuguj|bahuguj]] || [[word:bahugush|bahugush]] || [[word:bahugu|bahugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bahuguthul|bahuguthul]] || [[word:bahugujul|bahugujul]] || [[word:bahugushul|bahugushul]] || [[word:bahugukul|bahugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bahuguthuthu|bahuguthuthu]] || [[word:bahugujuju|bahugujuju]] || [[word:bahugushushu|bahugushushu]] || [[word:bahuguku|bahuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bahuguthun|bahuguthun]] || [[word:bahugujun|bahugujun]] || [[word:bahugushun|bahugushun]] || [[word:bahugukun|bahugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bahuguthuoro|bahuguthuoro]] || [[word:bahugujuoro|bahugujuoro]] || [[word:bahugushuoro|bahugushuoro]] || [[word:bahugukuoro|bahugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
